<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sìng]][[de:Wasser-Drache]][[fr:Dragon d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Ngìm-sìn]][[ja:壬辰]][[ko:임진]][[nds:Water-Draken]][[vi:Nhâm Thìn]][[za:Nyaemzsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sîn]][[zh-yue:壬辰]][[zh:壬辰]]

'''Yang Water Dragon also known as 壬辰''' (mizu no etatsu, jinsui no tatsu, jinshin) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 29th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Metal Rabbit]] and followed by [[Yin Water Snake]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Mizunoe (壬)]] represents yang [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon (辰)]] represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Restraint]]) (i.e. Earth overcomes Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: jinshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn

==Years of Yang Water Dragon==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yang Water Dragon]].

That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then

<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>
Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the [[Floor and ceiling functions]].

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Water Dragon (壬辰)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 32|32 AD]]
* [[AD 92|92 AD]]
* [[152|152 AD]]
* [[212|212 AD]]
* [[272|272 AD]]
* [[332|332 AD]]
* [[392|392 AD]]
* [[452|452 AD]]
* [[512|512 AD]]
* [[572|572 AD]]
* [[632|632 AD]]
* [[692|692 AD]]
* [[752|752 AD]]
* [[812|812 AD]]
* [[872|872 AD]]
* [[932|932 AD]]
* [[992|992 AD]]
|
* [[1052|1052 AD]]
* [[1112|1112 AD]]
* [[1172|1172 AD]]
* [[1232|1232 AD]]
* [[1292|1292 AD]]
* [[1352|1352 AD]]
* [[1412|1412 AD]]
* [[1472|1472 AD]]
* [[1532|1532 AD]]
* [[1592|1592 AD]]
* [[1652|1652 AD]]
* [[1712|1712 AD]]
* [[1772|1772 AD]]
* [[1832|1832 AD]]
* [[1892|1892 AD]]
* [[1952|1952 AD]]
|
* [[2012|2012 AD]]
* [[2072 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2132 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2192 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2252 AD]]
* [[24th century|2312 AD]]
* [[2372 AD]]
* [[2432 AD]]
* [[2492 AD]]
* [[2552 AD]]
* [[2612 AD]]
* [[2672 AD]]
* [[2732 AD]]
* [[2792 AD]]
* [[2852 AD]]
* [[2912 AD]]
* [[2972 AD]]
|}

===Events===
* In [[Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as [[Imjin War|Bunroku Campaign]] took place, which is known in Korea as the [[Imjin War]].

==Months of Yang Water Dragon==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoto (辛)]] and [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the month of [[March]] is designated as the [[Month]] of [[Yang Water Dragon]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[Lixia]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dragon==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yang Water Dragon]] is as follows.
==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The day of [[Yang Water Dragon]] is the 9th day of [[Ten directions]].

==See Also==
<!--Yang Water Dragon--><!--Yang Water Dragon-->

{{wikidata link|Q1062581}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
